programs.description: Food assistance for low-income households with limited resources and signs of food hardship.

fit_signals.reason: Clear food hardship strongly supports SNAP review.
Possible food hardship still supports SNAP review.
Recent job loss can increase need for food support.
Households with children may benefit from early SNAP review.

checklist_items: Proof of household income for the last 30 days
Social Security numbers for household members applying for SNAP
Proof of household expenses if claiming deductions
Signed SNAP application or COMPASS submission confirmation
base_caveats: SNAP prescreening can change if income details are incomplete or inconsistent.
Work-related or exemption rules may require follow-up.

programs.description: Health coverage support for uninsured or underinsured adults, children, and pregnancy-related pathways.

fit_signals.reason: No current coverage strongly supports Medicaid review.
Underinsurance can still justify Medicaid or CHIP review.
Pregnancy makes Medicaid review more important.
Children increase the relevance of Medicaid or CHIP review.

checklist_items: Employer and income information for everyone in the household
Policy numbers for current or recent health insurance
Proof of U.S. citizenship or lawful non-citizen status
base_caveats: Pregnancy, age bands, and current coverage details can change the result.
Household-composition details may affect Medicaid or CHIP pathways.

programs.description: Energy-assistance support for households struggling with heating costs or utility burden.

fit_signals.reason: A direct heating-assistance need strongly supports LIHEAP review.
High utility burden strongly supports LIHEAP review.
Moderate utility burden can still support LIHEAP review.
Income disruption can make heating costs harder to manage.

priority_signals.reason: Heating crises should be addressed quickly.

checklist_items: Recent bill from the main heating source
Proof of household income for each household member
Employer statements, pay stubs, or award letters for income verification
Lease or rent documentation if heating costs are included in rent
base_caveats: Heating-cost details and seasonal program rules may affect the result.
Some applicants may need extra documentation depending on rent and citizenship details.
